```text
14	
15	NODE_ID = 1                          # ODrive
16	AK_ID = 10                           # AK 조향
17	
18	# ODrive CANSimple cmd id (fw-v0.5.6)
19	C_HEARTBEAT = 0x001
20	C_ESTOP = 0x002
21	C_SET_STATE = 0x007
22	C_GET_ENC_EST = 0x009
23	C_SET_CTRL_MODE = 0x00B
24	C_SET_INPUT_POS = 0x00C
25	C_SET_INPUT_VEL = 0x00D
26	C_SET_INPUT_TORQUE = 0x00E
27	C_SET_LIMITS = 0x00F
28	C_GET_IQ = 0x014
29	C_GET_TEMP = 0x015
30	C_GET_BUS_VI = 0x017
31	C_CLEAR_ERR = 0x018
32	C_SET_POS_GAIN = 0x01A
33	C_SET_VEL_GAINS = 0x01B
34	C_SET_LINEAR_COUNT = 0x019
35	C_SET_TRAJ_VEL_LIMIT = 0x011
36	C_SET_TRAJ_ACCEL_LIMITS = 0x012
37	
38	AXIS_IDLE = 1
39	AXIS_CLOSED_LOOP = 8
40	AXIS_FULL_CALIB = 3
41	
42	# ODrive ControlMode / InputMode (fw-v0.5.6 정수값)
43	CTRL = {"position": 3, "position_traj": 3, "velocity": 2, "torque": 1}
44	# control_mode → 안전 기본 InputMode (POS_FILTER=3 / TRAP_TRAJ=5 / VEL_RAMP=2 / PASSTHROUGH=1) — jump 방지
45	IN_MODE = {"position": 3, "position_traj": 5, "velocity": 2, "torque": 1}
46	
47	_ODRIVE_SIGNALS = [
48	    "odrive.pos", "odrive.vel", "odrive.iq_meas", "odrive.iq_set",
49	    "odrive.temp_fet", "odrive.vbus", "odrive.ibus", "odrive.state",
50	    "odrive.axis_err",
51	]
52	_AK_SIGNALS = ["ak.pos_deg", "ak.speed", "ak.current", "ak.temp", "ak.fault"]
53	
54	
55	class CanBackend(Transport):
56	    """can0 위 ODrive(node1) CANSimple + AK(id10) servo 동시."""
57	
58	    name = "can"
59	
60	    def __init__(self, channel: str = "can0") -> None:
61	        self._channel = channel
62	        self._bus = None
63	        self._ak = None
64	        self._state = {k: 0.0 for k in _ODRIVE_SIGNALS}
65	        self._pos_offset = 0.0
66	        # CAN Set_Limits/Set_Vel_Gains 는 페어 프레임 → 부분 업데이트 병합용 캐시
67	        self._last_limits: dict = {}
68	        self._last_vel_gains: dict = {}
69	        self._last_trap: dict = {}
70	
71	    def connect(self) -> None:
72	        import can
73	        try:
74	            self._bus = can.interface.Bus(channel=self._channel,
75	                                          interface="socketcan")
76	        except OSError as e:
77	            raise TransportError(
78	                f"{self._channel} open 실패 — 'bash scripts/can_setup.sh' 먼저 ({e})")
79	        self._ak = AK(self._bus, AK_ID, name="steer")
80	
81	    def _send(self, cmd_id: int, data: bytes = b"") -> None:
82	        import can
83	        arb = (NODE_ID << 5) | cmd_id
84	        self._bus.send(can.Message(arbitration_id=arb, data=data,
85	                                   is_extended_id=False))
86	
87	    def _request(self, cmd_id: int) -> None:
88	        import can
89	        arb = (NODE_ID << 5) | cmd_id
90	        self._bus.send(can.Message(arbitration_id=arb, is_remote_frame=True,
91	                                   is_extended_id=False))
92	
93	    def sample(self) -> dict:
94	        self._request(C_GET_IQ)
95	        self._request(C_GET_TEMP)
96	        self._request(C_GET_BUS_VI)
97	        deadline = time.monotonic() + 0.008
98	        while time.monotonic() < deadline:
99	            msg = self._bus.recv(timeout=0.002)
100	            if msg is None:
101	                break
102	            self._decode_odrive(msg)
103	        self._ak.poll(timeout=0.005)
104	        s = {"t_mono": time.monotonic()}
105	        s.update(self._state)
106	        s["odrive.pos"] = float(self._state.get("odrive.pos", 0.0)) - self._pos_offset
107	        s.update({
108	            "ak.pos_deg": self._ak.pos_out_deg,
109	            "ak.speed": float(self._ak.spd_erpm),
110	            "ak.current": self._ak.cur_a,
111	            "ak.temp": float(self._ak.temp_c),
112	            "ak.fault": int(self._ak.fault),
113	        })
114	        return s
115	
116	    def _decode_odrive(self, msg) -> None:
117	        if msg.is_extended_id:
118	            return
119	        cmd = msg.arbitration_id & 0x1F
120	        node = msg.arbitration_id >> 5
121	        if node != NODE_ID:
122	            return
123	        d = msg.data
124	        if cmd == C_HEARTBEAT and len(d) >= 5:
125	            self._state["odrive.axis_err"] = struct.unpack("<I", d[:4])[0]
126	            self._state["odrive.state"] = d[4]
127	        elif cmd == C_GET_ENC_EST and len(d) >= 8:
128	            pos, vel = struct.unpack("<ff", d[:8])
129	            self._state["odrive.pos"] = pos
130	            self._state["odrive.vel"] = vel
131	        elif cmd == C_GET_IQ and len(d) >= 8:
132	            iq_set, iq_meas = struct.unpack("<ff", d[:8])
133	            self._state["odrive.iq_set"] = iq_set
134	            self._state["odrive.iq_meas"] = iq_meas
135	        elif cmd == C_GET_TEMP and len(d) >= 8:
136	            fet, _motor = struct.unpack("<ff", d[:8])
137	            self._state["odrive.temp_fet"] = fet
138	        elif cmd == C_GET_BUS_VI and len(d) >= 8:
139	            vbus, ibus = struct.unpack("<ff", d[:8])
140	            self._state["odrive.vbus"] = vbus
141	            self._state["odrive.ibus"] = ibus
142	
143	    def apply(self, cmd: dict) -> dict:
144	        target, op, args = cmd["target"], cmd["op"], cmd.get("args", {})
145	        try:
146	            if target == "ak":
147	                return self._apply_ak(op, args)
148	            return self._apply_odrive(op, args)
149	        except Exception as e:
150	            return {"ok": False, "target": target, "op": op, "detail": str(e)}
151	
152	    def _apply_odrive(self, op: str, args: dict) -> dict:
153	        known = {"estop", "set_mode", "set_input", "set_gain", "set_limit",
154	                 "set_state", "calibrate", "clear_errors", "set_origin"}
155	        if op not in known:
156	            return {"ok": False, "target": "odrive", "op": op,
157	                    "detail": "unsupported op"}
158	        if op == "estop":
159	            self._send(C_ESTOP)
160	        elif op == "set_mode":
161	            mode = args["control_mode"]
162	            self._send(C_SET_CTRL_MODE, struct.pack("<ii", CTRL[mode], IN_MODE[mode]))
163	            if mode in ("position", "position_traj"):
164	                cur = float(self._state.get("odrive.pos", 0.0))
165	                self._send(C_SET_INPUT_POS, struct.pack("<fhh", cur, 0, 0))
166	        elif op == "set_input":
167	            if "pos" in args:
168	                self._send(C_SET_INPUT_POS,
169	                           struct.pack("<fhh", float(args["pos"]) + self._pos_offset, 0, 0))
170	            elif "vel" in args:
171	                self._send(C_SET_INPUT_VEL, struct.pack("<ff", float(args["vel"]), 0.0))
172	            elif "torque" in args:
173	                self._send(C_SET_INPUT_TORQUE, struct.pack("<f", float(args["torque"])))
174	        elif op == "set_gain":
175	            if "pos_gain" in args:
176	                self._send(C_SET_POS_GAIN, struct.pack("<f", float(args["pos_gain"])))
177	            if "vel_gain" in args or "vel_integrator_gain" in args:
178	                merged = dict(self._last_vel_gains)
179	                for k in ("vel_gain", "vel_integrator_gain"):
180	                    if k in args:
181	                        merged[k] = float(args[k])
182	                if "vel_gain" not in merged or "vel_integrator_gain" not in merged:
183	                    return {"ok": False, "target": "odrive", "op": op,
184	                            "detail": "CAN set_gain(vel) needs both vel_gain & "
185	                                      "vel_integrator_gain on first set"}
186	                self._send(C_SET_VEL_GAINS, struct.pack("<ff",
187	                           merged["vel_gain"], merged["vel_integrator_gain"]))
188	                self._last_vel_gains = merged
189	            if "trap_vel_limit" in args:
190	                self._send(C_SET_TRAJ_VEL_LIMIT,
191	                           struct.pack("<f", float(args["trap_vel_limit"])))
192	            if "trap_accel_limit" in args or "trap_decel_limit" in args:
193	                for k in ("trap_accel_limit", "trap_decel_limit"):
194	                    if k in args:
195	                        self._last_trap[k] = float(args[k])
196	                if "trap_accel_limit" in self._last_trap and "trap_decel_limit" in self._last_trap:
197	                    self._send(C_SET_TRAJ_ACCEL_LIMITS, struct.pack("<ff",
198	                               self._last_trap["trap_accel_limit"],
199	                               self._last_trap["trap_decel_limit"]))
200	        elif op == "set_limit":
201	            merged = dict(self._last_limits)
202	            for k in ("vel_limit", "current_lim"):
203	                if k in args:
204	                    merged[k] = float(args[k])
205	            if "vel_limit" not in merged or "current_lim" not in merged:
206	                return {"ok": False, "target": "odrive", "op": op,
207	                        "detail": "CAN set_limit needs both vel_limit & "
208	                                  "current_lim on first set"}
209	            self._send(C_SET_LIMITS, struct.pack("<ff",
210	                       merged["vel_limit"], merged["current_lim"]))
211	            self._last_limits = merged
212	        elif op == "set_state":
213	            st = AXIS_CLOSED_LOOP if args.get("state") == "closed_loop" else AXIS_IDLE
214	            self._send(C_SET_STATE, struct.pack("<I", st))
215	        elif op == "calibrate":
216	            self._send(C_SET_STATE, struct.pack("<I", AXIS_FULL_CALIB))
217	        elif op == "clear_errors":
218	            self._send(C_CLEAR_ERR)
219	        elif op == "set_origin":
220	            cur = float(self._state.get("odrive.pos", 0.0))
221	            self._pos_offset = cur
222	            self._send(C_SET_INPUT_POS, struct.pack("<fhh", cur, 0, 0))  # 현재 위치 hold
223	        return {"ok": True, "target": "odrive", "op": op, "detail": "sent"}
224	
225	    def _apply_ak(self, op: str, args: dict) -> dict:
226	        known = {"estop", "set_input", "set_origin"}
227	        if op not in known:
228	            return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op,
229	                    "detail": "unsupported op"}
230	        if op == "estop":
231	            self._ak.stop()
232	        elif op == "set_input":
233	            if "pos_deg" in args:
234	                self._ak.send_pos_out(float(args["pos_deg"]))
235	            elif "rpm" in args:
236	                self._ak.send_rpm_out(float(args["rpm"]))
237	        elif op == "set_origin":
238	            self._ak.set_origin_here()
239	        return {"ok": True, "target": "ak", "op": op, "detail": "sent"}
240	
241	    def capabilities(self) -> dict:
242	        return {
243	            "track": "can",
244	            "devices": ["odrive", "ak"],
245	            "signals": _ODRIVE_SIGNALS + _AK_SIGNALS,
246	            "commands": {
247	                "odrive": ["set_mode", "set_input", "set_gain", "set_limit",
248	                           "set_state", "calibrate", "clear_errors",
249	                           "set_origin", "estop"],
250	                "ak": ["set_input", "set_origin", "estop"],
251	            },
252	            "limits": {"odrive": {"vel": 200.0, "torque": 10.0, "pos": 100.0},
253	                       "ak": {"pos_deg": 360.0}},
254	            "control_modes": {"odrive": ODRIVE_CONTROL_MODES},
255	            "inputs": {"odrive": ODRIVE_INPUTS},
256	            "tunables": {"odrive": ODRIVE_TUNABLES_CAN},
257	            "signal_meta": SIGNAL_META,
258	            "notes": ["CAN 트랙 — ODrive+AK 동시. NVM 저장 불가 (USB 전용)"],
259	        }
260	
261	    def read_tunables(self) -> di
```

```text
1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import time
4	
5	from .base import (Transport, TransportError, SIGNAL_META, ODRIVE_CONTROL_MODES,
6	                   ODRIVE_INPUTS, ODRIVE_TUNABLES_USB)
7	
8	_ODRIVE_SIGNALS = [
9	    "odrive.pos", "odrive.pos_setpoint", "odrive.vel", "odrive.vel_setpoint",
10	    "odrive.iq_meas", "odrive.iq_set", "odrive.id_meas", "odrive.id_set",
11	    "odrive.torque_est",
12	    "odrive.temp_fet", "odrive.vbus", "odrive.ibus", "odrive.state",
13	    "odrive.axis_err", "odrive.motor_err", "odrive.enc_err",
14	    "odrive.ctrl_err", "odrive.vel_integrator",
15	]
16	
17	# TRAP 순항속도는 vel_limit 에 강제 결합(set_limit 에서 동기) → 별도 노출 안 함.
18	# trap_vel_limit > vel_limit 이면 궤적이 속도루프보다 앞서 달려 위치오차가
19	# 누적되고(windup), vel_limit 을 풀면 그 오차가 한 번에 방출돼 폭주/저전압을 유발.
20	_USB_TUNABLES = [t for t in ODRIVE_TUNABLES_USB if t["key"] != "trap_vel_limit"]
21	
22	
23	class UsbOdriveBackend(Transport):
24	    """ODrive USB (odrive lib, axis1, fw-v0.5.6). NVM 저장 지원."""
25	
26	    name = "usb"
27	
28	    def __init__(self, axis_num: int = 1, timeout: float = 15.0) -> None:
29	        self._timeout = timeout
30	        self._axis_num = axis_num
31	        self._drv = None
32	        self._ax = None
33	        self._fet_therm = None      # fw 별 위치 달라 connect 에서 resolve
34	        self._enums: dict = {}
35	        self._vel_limit = 5.0       # 사용자가 의도한 속도(=TRAP 순항). 캡과 구분.
36	        self._torque_const = 0.0    # Iq→토크 환산 (motor.config.torque_constant)
37	        self._motor_info: dict = {}  # 정적 모터 파라미터 (capabilities 노출)
38	
39	    def connect(self) -> None:
40	        import odrive
41	        from odrive.enums import (AxisState, ControlMode, InputMode)
42	        drv = odrive.find_any(timeout=self._timeout)
43	        if drv is None:
44	            raise TransportError("ODrive USB not found")
45	        self._drv = drv
46	        self._ax = drv.axis1 if self._axis_num == 1 else drv.axis0
47	        # FET 서미스터 위치가 fw 별로 다름 (0.5.1=axis.fet_thermistor,
48	        # 일부 빌드=axis.motor.fet_thermistor). connect 시 1회 resolve.
49	        self._fet_therm = (getattr(self._ax, "fet_thermistor", None)
50	                           or getattr(self._ax.motor, "fet_thermistor", None))
51	        # 토크(current) 모드에서도 vel_limit 존중 보장 (무부하 runaway 방지).
52	        try:
53	            self._ax.controller.config.enable_current_mode_vel_limit = True
54	        except Exception:
55	            pass
56	        # fw-v0.5.6 plain Enum → wire I/O 용 int 상수 (0.6.x IntEnum 도 .value 동작)
57	        self._enums = {
58	            "IDLE": AxisState.IDLE.value,
59	            "CLOSED_LOOP": AxisState.CLOSED_LOOP_CONTROL.value,
60	            "FULL_CALIB": AxisState.FULL_CALIBRATION_SEQUENCE.value,
61	            "POSITION": ControlMode.POSITION_CONTROL.value,
62	            "VELOCITY": ControlMode.VELOCITY_CONTROL.value,
63	            "TORQUE": ControlMode.TORQUE_CONTROL.value,
64	            "PASSTHROUGH": InputMode.PASSTHROUGH.value,
65	            "POS_FILTER": InputMode.POS_FILTER.value,
66	            "VEL_RAMP": InputMode.VEL_RAMP.value,
67	            "TRAP_TRAJ": InputMode.TRAP_TRAJ.value,
68	        }
69	        self._vel_limit = float(self._ax.controller.config.vel_limit)
70	        self._sync_vel_limit()
71	        # 정적 모터 파라미터 (캘리브레이션 결과) — 1회 읽어 토크 환산/표시에 사용.
72	        mc = self._ax.motor.config
73	        self._torque_const = float(getattr(mc, "torque_constant", 0.0))
74	        self._motor_info = {
75	            "phase_resistance": float(getattr(mc, "phase_resistance", 0.0)),
76	            "phase_inductance": float(getattr(mc, "phase_inductance", 0.0)),
77	            "torque_constant": self._torque_const,
78	            "pole_pairs": int(getattr(mc, "pole_pairs", 0)),
79	            "current_lim": float(getattr(mc, "current_lim", 0.0)),
80	        }
81	
82	    def _sync_vel_limit(self) -> None:
83	        """현재 모드에 맞춰 controller.vel_limit(하드 캡) 설정.
84	
85	        TRAP: 순항=self._vel_limit, 하드캡=순항×1.3. 캡에 헤드룸을 둬야 위치오차
86	        보정 여력이 남아 gap 누적/방출 스파이크가 안 생긴다(피드포워드가 캡을
87	        다 먹으면 gap 이 쌓였다가 캡 해제 시 한 번에 튐). 단 현재 속도 아래로는
88	        안 내림(overspeed=CONTROLLER_FAILED 트립 방지).
89	        그 외(velocity/POS_FILTER): vel_limit 이 곧 속도 캡 → 그대로.
90	        """
91	        ax = self._ax
92	        in_trap = int(ax.controller.config.input_mode) == self._enums["TRAP_TRAJ"]
93	        ax.trap_traj.config.vel_limit = self._vel_limit
94	        if in_trap:
95	            cur = abs(float(ax.encoder.vel_estimate))
96	            ax.controller.config.vel_limit = max(self._vel_limit * 1.3, cur * 1.3)
97	        else:
98	            ax.controller.config.vel_limit = self._vel_limit
99	
100	    def sample(self) -> dict:
101	        ax, drv = self._ax, self._drv
102	        m = ax.motor.current_control
103	        iq_meas = float(m.Iq_measured)
104	        return {
105	            "t_mono": time.monotonic(),
106	            "odrive.pos": float(ax.encoder.pos_estimate),
107	            "odrive.pos_setpoint": float(ax.controller.pos_setpoint),
108	            "odrive.vel": float(ax.encoder.vel_estimate),
109	            "odrive.vel_setpoint": float(ax.controller.vel_setpoint),
110	            "odrive.iq_meas": iq_meas,
111	            "odrive.iq_set": float(m.Iq_setpoint),
112	            "odrive.id_meas": float(m.Id_measured),
113	            "odrive.id_set": float(m.Id_setpoint),
114	            "odrive.torque_est": iq_meas * self._torque_const,  # τ = Iq × Kt [Nm]
115	            "odrive.temp_fet": (float(self._fet_therm.temperature)
116	                                if self._fet_therm is not None else 0.0),
117	            "odrive.vbus": float(drv.vbus_voltage),
118	            "odrive.ibus": float(getattr(drv, "ibus", 0.0)),
119	            "odrive.state": int(ax.current_state),
120	            "odrive.axis_err": int(ax.error),
121	            "odrive.motor_err": int(ax.motor.error),
122	            "odrive.enc_err": int(ax.encoder.error),
123	            "odrive.ctrl_err": int(ax.controller.error),
124	            "odrive.vel_integrator": float(ax.controller.vel_integrator_torque),
125	        }
126	
127	    def apply(self, cmd: dict) -> dict:
128	        ax = self._ax
129	        op, args = cmd["op"], cmd.get("args", {})
130	        try:
131	            if op == "estop":
132	                ax.requested_state = self._enums["IDLE"]
133	            elif op == "set_mode":
134	                mode = args["control_mode"]
135	                cm = {"position": "POSITION", "position_traj": "POSITION",
136	                      "velocity": "VELOCITY", "torque": "TORQUE"}[mode]
137	                im_def = {"position": "POS_FILTER", "position_traj": "TRAP_TRAJ",
138	                          "velocity": "VEL_RAMP", "torque": "PASSTHROUGH"}[mode]
139	                ax.controller.config.control_mode = self._enums[cm]
140	                im = args.get("input_mode", im_def)
141	                if im in self._enums:
142	                    ax.controller.config.input_mode = self._enums[im]
143	                self._sync_vel_limit()  # 모드별 캡 재적용(TRAP=헤드룸 / 그외=정확)
144	                if cm == "POSITION":
145	                    ax.controller.input_pos = ax.encoder.pos_estimate  # 현재 위치 hold
146	            elif op == "set_input":
147	                if "pos" in args:
148	                    ax.controller.input_pos = float(args["pos"])
149	                elif "vel" in args:
150	                    ax.controller.input_vel = float(args["vel"])
151	                elif "torque" in args:
152	                    ax.controller.input_torque = float(args["torque"])
153	            elif op == "set_gain":
154	                for k in ("pos_gain", "vel_gain", "vel_integrator_gain",
155	                          "input_filter_bandwidth"):
156	                    if k in args:
157	                        setattr(ax.controller.config, k, float(args[k]))
158	                # trap_vel_limit 는 무시(vel_limit 에 결합) — set_limit 에서만 설정.
159	                trap_map = {"trap_accel_limit": "accel_limit",
160	                            "trap_decel_limit": "decel_limit"}
161	                for k, attr in trap_map.items():
162	                    if k in args:
163	                        setattr(ax.trap_traj.config, attr, float(args[k]))
164	            elif op == "set_limit":
165	                if "vel_limit" in args:
166	                    self._vel_limit = float(args["vel_limit"])
167	                    self._sync_vel_limit()  # 모드별 캡(TRAP=헤드룸) + 순항속도 적용
168	                    # TRAP 진행 중이면 input_pos 재발행 → 새 순항속도로 궤적 재계획
169	                    # (가속한계 지켜 부드럽게 변속. 재계획 없으면 옛 속도로 끝까지 감.)
170	                    if (int(ax.controller.config.input_mode) == self._enums["TRAP_TRAJ"]
171	                            and int(ax.current_state) == self._enums["CLOSED_LOOP"]):
172	                        ax.controller.input_pos = float(ax.controller.input_pos)
173	                if "current_lim" in args:
174	                    ax.motor.config.current_lim = float(args["current_lim"])
175	            elif op == "set_state":
176	                if args.get("state") == "closed_loop":
177	                    ax.controller.input_pos = ax.encoder.pos_estimate  # jump 방지
178	                    ax.requested_state = self._enums["CLOSED_LOOP"]
179	                else:
180	                    ax.requested_state = self._enums["IDLE"]
181	            elif op == "calibrate":
182	                ax.requested_state = self._enums["FULL_CALIB"]
183	            elif op == "clear_errors":
184	                ax.clear_errors()
185	                try:
186	                    self._drv.clear_errors()
187	                except Exception:
188	                    pass
189	            elif op == "set_origin":
190	                # 순정 영점: IDLE 디스암 → set_linear_count(0) → input_pos=0 → 재무장.
191	                # 컨트롤러 setpoint 까지 0 으로 같이 리셋되어 옛 setpoint 로 튀지 않음.
192	                was_closed = int(ax.current_state) == self._enums["CLOSED_LOOP"]
193	                ax.requested_state = self._enums["IDLE"]
194	                time.sleep(0.2)
195	                ax.encoder.set_linear_count(0)
196	                ax.controller.input_pos = 0.0
197	                if was_closed:
198	                    ax.requested_state = self._enums["CLOSED_LOOP"]
199	            elif op == "save_nvm":
200	                self._drv.save_configuration()
201	            return {"ok": True, "target": "odrive", "op": op, "detail": "ok"}
202	        except Exception as e:
203	            return {"ok": False, "target": "odrive", "op": op, "detail": str(e)}
204	
205	    def capabilities(self) -> dict:
206	        return {
207	            "track": "usb",
208	            "devices": ["odrive"],
209	            "signals": _ODRIVE_SIGNALS,
210	            "commands": {"odrive": ["set_mode", "set_input", "set_gain",
211	                                    "set_limit", "set_state", "calibrate",
212	                                    "clear_errors", "save_nvm", "set_origin",
213	                                    "estop"]},
214	            "limits": {"odrive": {"vel": 200.0, "torque": 10.0, "pos": 100000.0}},
215	            "control_modes": {"odrive": ODRIVE_CONTROL_MODES},
216	            "inputs": {"odrive": ODRIVE_INPUTS},
217	            "tunables": {"odrive": _USB_TUNABLES},
218	            "signal_meta": SIGNAL_META,
219	            "motor_info": {"odrive": self._motor_info},
220	            "notes": ["USB 트랙 — ODrive 단독, NVM 저장 가능"],
221	        }
222	
223	    def read_tunables(self) -> dict:
224	        if self._ax is None:
225	            return {}

229	            "vel_gain": float(c.vel_gain),

231	            "vel_limit": float(self._vel_limit),  # 사용자 의도값(캡은 TRAP 시 헤드룸 포함)
232	            "current_lim": float(self._ax.motor.config.current_lim),
233	        }
234	        try:
```

```text
1	from __future__ import annotations

6	
7	from .base import SIGNAL_META
8	from .can_device import CanDevice
9	
10	# steering/ak_control.py 의 AK40 재사용 (hw 로직 단일 소스)
11	sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[3] / "motor_control" / "steering"))
12	from ak_control import AK40, POLE_PAIRS, GEAR_RATIO  # noqa: E402
13	
14	AK_ID = 10
15	PKT_STATUS_1 = 41
16	_AK_SIGNALS = ["ak.pos_deg", "ak.speed", "ak.current", "ak.temp", "ak.fault", "ak.tripped",
17	               "ak.pos_cmd", "ak.speed_cmd"]
18	_RESEND_HZ = 20.0
19	_ERPM_PER_RPM = POLE_PAIRS * GEAR_RATIO   # 출력축 RPM → 전기 ERPM (=140)
20	
21	
22	class AkDevice(CanDevice):
23	    """AK40 조향 모터 (확장 CAN ID). 3모드(position/velocity/duty) + 워치독 재전송 + 과전류 자동정지."""
24	
25	    name = "ak"
26	
27	    def __init__(self, motor_id: int = AK_ID) -> None:
28	        self._mid = motor_id
29	        self._ak = None
30	        self._mode = "position"
31	        self._active = None          # 재전송할 무인자 호출 (워치독)
32	        self._spd = 1500.0
33	        self._acc = 6000.0
34	        self._maxcur = 5.0
35	        self._last_send = 0.0
36	        self._tripped = False
37	        self._pos_cmd = 0.0
38	        self._speed_cmd = 0.0
39	
40	    def attach(self, bus) -> None:
41	        self._ak = AK40(bus, self._mid, name="ak")
42	        self._active = None
43	        self._tripped = False
44	        self._pos_cmd = 0.0
45	        self._speed_cmd = 0.0
46	
47	    def capabilities_fragment(self) -> dict:
48	        meta = {k: SIGNAL_META[k] for k in _AK_SIGNALS if k in SIGNAL_META}
49	        return {
50	            "devices": ["ak"],
51	            "signals": list(_AK_SIGNALS),
52	            "commands": {"ak": ["set_mode", "set_input", "set_param",
53	                                 "set_origin", "estop"]},
54	            "control_modes": {"ak": ["position", "velocity", "duty"]},
55	            "inputs": {"ak": {
56	                "position": {"key": "pos_deg", "label": "목표 위치", "unit": "°",
57	                             "help": "목표 각도(출력축°)로 이동. 이동 속도·가속은 아래 [속도제한]·[가속] 튜닝값을 따름."},
58	                "velocity": {"key": "rpm", "label": "목표 속도(출력축)", "unit": "RPM",
59	                             "help": "입력 RPM이 곧 목표속도(출력축). 최대 ~43RPM(무부하). ※[속도제한] 튜닝은 velocity엔 미적용."},
60	                "duty": {"key": "duty", "label": "듀티", "unit": "",
61	                         "help": "출력 듀티(-1~1) 직접 인가(개루프). 속도제한 없음 — 주의."},
62	            }},
63	            "tunables": {"ak": [
64	                {"op": "set_param", "key": "spd_erpm", "label": "속도제한 [ERPM]",
65	                 "value": self._spd, "help": "position 이동 순항속도 (전기 RPM). ※position 모드 전용"},
66	                {"op": "set_param", "key": "spd_rpm", "label": "속도제한 [RPM]",
67	                 "value": self._spd / _ERPM_PER_RPM,
68	                 "help": "position 이동 순항속도 (출력축 RPM = ERPM÷140). ※position 모드 전용"},
69	                {"op": "set_param", "key": "acc_erpm_s2", "label": "가속 [ERPM/s²]",
70	                 "value": self._acc, "help": "position 이동 가속 (전기 RPM/s²). ※position 모드 전용"},
71	                {"op": "set_param", "key": "acc_rpm_s2", "label": "가속 [RPM/s²]",
72	                 "value": self._acc / _ERPM_PER_RPM,
73	                 "help": "position 이동 가속 (출력축 RPM/s²). ※position 모드 전용"},
74	                {"op": "set_param", "key": "max_cur_a", "label": "최대전류(자동정지) [A]",
75	                 "value": self._maxcur, "help": "이 전류 초과 시 자동 정지 (안전, 전 모드)"},
76	            ]},
77	            "limits": {"ak": {"pos_deg": 100000.0, "rpm": 45.0, "duty": 1.0}},
78	            "signal_meta": meta,
79	        }
80	
81	    def on_rx(self, msg) -> None:
82	        if not msg.is_extended_id:
83	            return
84	        pkt = (msg.arbitration_id >> 8) & 0xFF
85	        nid = msg.arbitration_id & 0xFF
86	        if pkt == PKT_STATUS_1 and nid == self._mid and len(msg.data) >= 8:
87	            self._ak._parse_status(msg.data)
88	
89	    def _fire(self) -> None:
90	        if self._active is not None:
91	            self._active()
92	            self._last_send = time.monotonic()
93	
94	    def tick(self, bus) -> None:
95	        if self._ak is None:
96	            return
97	        if abs(self._ak.cur_a) > self._maxcur:      # 과전류 자동정지
98	            self._ak.send_rpm_out(0)
99	            self._active = None
100	            self._tripped = True
101	            return
102	        now = time.monotonic()
103	        if self._active is not None and now - self._last_send >= 1.0 / _RESEND_HZ:
104	            self._fire()
105	
106	    def sample(self) -> dict:
107	        a = self._ak
108	        if a is None:
109	            return {k: 0.0 for k in _AK_SIGNALS}
110	        out_rpm = -a.spd_erpm / (POLE_PAIRS * GEAR_RATIO)  # send_rpm_out 가 부호 반전 → 명령 부호와 일치시킴
111	        return {
112	            "ak.pos_deg": float(a.pos_out_deg),
113	            "ak.speed": float(out_rpm),
114	            "ak.current": float(a.cur_a),
115	            "ak.temp": float(a.temp_c),
116	            "ak.fault": int(a.fault),
117	            "ak.tripped": int(self._tripped),
118	            "ak.pos_cmd": float(self._pos_cmd),
119	            "ak.speed_cmd": float(self._speed_cmd),
120	        }
121	
122	    def apply(self, bus, op: str, args: dict) -> dict:
123	        a = self._ak
124	        try:
125	            if op == "estop":
126	                a.stop()
127	                self._active = None
128	            elif op == "set_mode":
129	                self._mode = args["control_mode"]
130	                self._tripped = False
131	                self._pos_cmd = a.pos_out_deg   # 비활성 모드 오버레이가 실제값을 따라가게(stale 방지)
132	                self._speed_cmd = 0.0
133	                if self._mode == "position":
134	                    tgt = a.pos_out_deg
135	                    self._pos_cmd = tgt
136	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_pos_out(tgt, self._spd, self._acc)
137	                elif self._mode == "velocity":
138	                    self._speed_cmd = 0.0
139	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_rpm_out(0.0)
140	                elif self._mode == "duty":
141	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_duty(0.0)
142	                else:
143	                    return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op,
144	                            "detail": f"unsupported mode {self._mode}"}
145	                self._fire()
146	            elif op == "set_input":
147	                expected = {"position": "pos_deg", "velocity": "rpm",
148	                            "duty": "duty"}[self._mode]
149	                if expected not in args:
150	                    return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op,
151	                            "detail": f"'{expected}' 필요 (현재 모드 {self._mode})"}
152	                self._tripped = False
153	                if "pos_deg" in args:
154	                    tgt = float(args["pos_deg"])
155	                    self._pos_cmd = tgt
156	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_pos_out(tgt, self._spd, self._acc)
157	                elif "rpm" in args:
158	                    v = float(args["rpm"])
159	                    self._speed_cmd = v
160	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_rpm_out(v)
161	                elif "duty" in args:
162	                    v = float(args["duty"])
163	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_duty(v)
164	                else:
165	                    return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op,
166	                            "detail": "no known input key"}
167	                self._fire()
168	            elif op == "set_param":
169	                if "spd_erpm" in args:
170	                    self._spd = float(args["spd_erpm"])
171	                if "spd_rpm" in args:
172	                    self._spd = float(args["spd_rpm"]) * _ERPM_PER_RPM
173	                if "acc_erpm_s2" in args:
174	                    self._acc = float(args["acc_erpm_s2"])
175	                if "acc_rpm_s2" in args:
176	                    self._acc = float(args["acc_rpm_s2"]) * _ERPM_PER_RPM
177	                if "max_cur_a" in args:
178	                    self._maxcur = float(args["max_cur_a"])
179	            elif op == "set_origin":
180	                a.set_origin_here()
181	                self._pos_cmd = 0.0
182	                if self._mode == "position":
183	                    self._active = lambda: a.send_pos_out(0.0, self._spd, self._acc)
184	                    self._fire()
185	            else:
186	                return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op,
187	                        "detail": "unsupported op"}
188	            return {"ok": True, "target": "ak", "op": op, "detail": "sent"}
189	        except Exception as e:
190	            return {"ok": False, "target": "ak", "op": op, "detail": str(e)}
191	
192	    def close(self, bus) -> None:
193	        if self._ak is not None:
194	            try:
195	                self._ak.stop()
196	            except Exception:
197	                pass
198
```

```text
1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
4	
5	
6	class TransportError(Exception):
7	    """전송 계층 연결/IO 실패."""
8	
9	
10	class Transport(ABC):
11	    """모든 전송(USB/CAN/Fake)의 공통 계약.
12	
13	    sample()/apply()/capabilities() 는 **JSON-직렬화 가능한 dict 만** 주고받는다
14	    (웹 레이어와의 seam — 향후 프로세스 격리 시 그대로 IPC 경계가 됨).
15	    """
16	
17	    name: str = "base"
18	
19	    @abstractmethod
20	    def connect(self) -> None:
21	        """장치 연결. 실패 시 TransportError."""
22	
23	    @abstractmethod
24	    def sample(self) -> dict:
25	        """텔레메트리 1프레임. 항상 't_mono' 포함, 키는 '<device>.<signal>'."""
26	
27	    @abstractmethod
28	    def apply(self, cmd: dict) -> dict:
29	        """정규화된 command envelope 적용. ack dict 반환."""
30	
31	    @abstractmethod
32	    def capabilities(self) -> dict:
33	        """이 트랙이 노출하는 devices/signals/commands/limits/notes."""
34	
35	    @abstractmethod
36	    def close(self) -> None:
37	        """안전 정지 + 자원 해제."""
38	
39	    def read_tunables(self) -> dict:
40	        """현재 튜닝 파라미터 값 {key: value}. 미지원/미연결 시 빈 dict.
41	        connect() 후 호출됨 (worker.start 에서 1회)."""
42	        return {}
43	
44	
45	# ── 프론트 데이터-드리븐 UI 메타 (capabilities 에 포함) ────────────────
```

```text
24:def _make_transport(track: str):
25:    if track == "fake":
28:    if track == "usb":
29:        from .transport.usb_odrive import UsbOdriveBackend
30:        return UsbOdriveBackend()
31:    if track == "ak":
32:        from .transport.can_device import CanTransport
33:        from .transport.ak_device import AkDevice
34:        return CanTransport([AkDevice()], track="ak")
35:    if track == "can":
36:        from .transport.can_bus import CanBackend
37:        return CanBackend()
38:    raise ValueError(f"unknown track: {track!r}")
41:def create_app(track: str = "fake") -> FastAPI:
43:    worker = HardwareWorker(_make_transport(track))
87:            path = str(logdir / f"motor_{track}_{_t.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.csv")
127:    p.add_argument("--track", choices=["fake", "usb", "can", "ak"], default="fake")
131:    uvicorn.run(create_app(track=args.track), host=args.host, port=args.port)
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T15:56:51.695Z` line 3511

```text
기존 코드를 다 파악했습니다. 핵심 발견:

- **모놀리식 `can_bus.py`에 ODrive CANSimple 프로토콜이 이미 구현돼 있음** (cmd id, decode, apply) — 이걸 `OdriveCanDevice(CanDevice)`로 추출하면 됩니다.
- **현재 `--track can`**은 모놀리식 ODrive+AK 동시(미검증). 컴포저블 `--track ak`는 검증 완료.
- **CAN 프로토콜 한계로 USB 대비 불가능한 것들**:
  - `Id`(자속축) — CANSimple `Get_Iq`는 Iq set/meas만 줌 (Id 없음)
  - `pos_setpoint`/`vel_setpoint` 직접 readback 없음 → AkDevice처럼 **명령값 로컬 추적**으로 오버레이
  - `torque_constant`/모터 파라미터 readback 없음 → 토크 추정·모터정보 패널이 USB처럼 자동 안 됨
  - NVM 저장 불가 (이미 명시됨)
- **CAN으로도 되는 것**: pos/vel/Iq(set+meas)/온도/버스전압·전류/state/axis_err(RTR 폴링 — 방금 검증), 영점(`Set_Linear_Count` 0x019 네이티브), 4개 제어모드 전부.

설계에 영향을 주는 두 가지를 확인하겠습니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:04:17.715Z` line 3515

```text
좋습니다. 두 번째 질문에 답을 겸해 정리하면 —

## "AK 환경 그대로" 가져오려면 → 새 `--track odrive_can` (옵션 A)

**이유**: AK 트랙(`--track ak` → `CanTransport([AkDevice()])`)의 **구조적 쌍둥이**가 됩니다. 그리고 핵심은 — **프론트엔드가 이미 capabilities 기반 데이터-드리븐**이라, 디바이스만 추가하면 모드 셀렉터·튜닝 패널·setpoint 오버레이·재연결·그래프가 **프론트 수정 0으로 자동 적응**합니다. AK 만들 때 쌓은 GUI 환경이 그대로 ODrive로 옮겨집니다. 4단계는 `CanTransport([OdriveCanDevice(), AkDevice()])` 한 줄. 기존 미검증 모놀리식 `can`은 4단계에서 컴포저블로 재구축하며 폐기.

옵션 B는 `can`의 의미(현재 동시제어)를 깨고 이름이 헷갈려서 비추천입니다.

이제 설계를 제시합니다 (승인받고 spec 문서화 → plan으로 진행).

---

## 설계: ODrive-CAN GUI (3단계)

### 아키텍처
`OdriveCanDevice(CanDevice)` 신규 — 보존된 `can_bus.py`의 ODrive CANSimple 로직을 컴포저블 디바이스로 추출. `name="odrive"`, node_id=1(=axis1 컨벤션).

- **request(bus)**: 매 샘플 RTR 폴링 → `Get_Encoder_Estimates(0x09)`, `Get_Iq(0x14)`, `Get_Temp(0x15)`, `Get_Bus_VI(0x17)`. (Heartbeat는 수동 수신) — *방금 RTR 응답 검증 완료*
- **on_rx(msg)**: 11-bit, node==1 프레임 디코드 → 상태 캐시
- **sample()**: 캐시 + `torque_est = iq_meas × Kt`(하드코딩 X2212 상수) + **로컬 추적 setpoint**(pos_cmd/vel_cmd, AkDevice 방식 — CAN엔 setpoint readback 없음)
- **apply()**: set_mode / set_input / set_gain / set_limit / set_state / calibrate / clear_errors / set_origin / estop

### USB 대비 차이 (CAN 프로토콜 한계)
| 기능 | CAN |
|------|-----|
| pos/vel/Iq(set·meas)/온도/Vbus/Ibus/state/axis_err | ✅ RTR 폴링 |
| **Id (자속축)** | ❌ Get_Iq에 없음 → 그래프 자동 생략 |
| setpoint 오버레이 | ✅ 명령값 로컬 추적 (AK 방식) |
| **토크 추정·모터정보 패널** | ✅ **X2212 상수 하드코딩**으로 표시 (정확값은 USB readout 기준 HIL 확인) |
| **영점** | ✅ 네이티브 `Set_Linear_Count(0)` IDLE-바운스 (USB와 동일) |
| NVM 저장 | ❌ (이미 명시) |

### 알려진 HIL 픽스 이식
- **TRAP 속도캡 헤드룸**(cap=순항×1.3): 위치오차 windup→방출 스파이크 방지. `trap_vel_limit`은 vel_limit에 결합해 UI에서 제거 (USB와 동일).
- 폐루프 진입 시 `input_pos=현재위치` (점프 방지).

### 변경 파일
- **신규** `transport/odrive_can_device.py`
- **수정** `server.py` (`--track odrive_can` 추가)
- **수정** `transport/can_device.py` (`CanTransport.capabilities`에 `motor_info` 집계 추가 — 현재 미집계)
- 프론트엔드 **변경 없음** (capability-driven)
- 테스트: `test_odrive_can_device.py` 신규 (가짜 버스 주입), `test_server.py` 확장

### 결정 필요: torque 모드 포함 여부 ⚠️
ODrive 토크 모드는 정상 기능이지만, 무부하 runaway를 막는 `enable_current_mode_vel_limit`을 **CAN으로는 설정 불가**(config 항목, CANSimple 명령 없음). USB는 connect 시 켜지만 CAN은 못 켭니다.

**추천: 3단계는 position / position_traj / velocity 3모드만** (AK 때의 안전 신중함과 일치). 토크 모드는 사용자가 USB로 `enable_current_mode_vel_limit=True`를 NVM 저장해둔 경우에만 추후 활성화. 

이대로 진행할까요? 특히 **torque 모드 제외(3모드)** 결정에 동의하시는지 확인 부탁드립니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:06:51.932Z` line 3524

```text
완벽히 이해했습니다. 수정 반영:
- **torque 모드 제외** (3모드: position/position_traj/velocity) — 동의
- **모터 상수 하드코딩 안 함** → **편집 가능한 prefill 텍스트박스 하나**(토크 상수 Kt)로. set_param 튜너블로 노출, 기본값 prefill, 사용자가 언제든 변경 → torque_est 즉시 반영. 읽을 수 없는 나머지 모터정보(R/L/pp) 패널은 CAN에선 생략 (가짜값 표시 안 함).

이러면 `CanTransport`에 motor_info 집계 추가도 불필요해져 더 단순해집니다. 추가 질문 없이 spec 문서로 정리하겠습니다.

기존 spec 명명 규칙(`docs/specs/`)을 따르겠습니다.
```

### user `2026-05-22T16:12:55.835Z` line 3553

```text
Base directory for this skill: /home/light/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.1.0/skills/writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** If working in an isolated worktree, it should have been created via the `superpowers:using-git-worktrees` skill at execution time.

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans — one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

` ` `markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
` ` `

## Task Structure

` ` ``markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**
- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

` ` `python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
` ` `

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

` ` `python
def function(input):
    return expected
` ` `

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

` ` `bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
` ` `
` ` ``

## No Placeholders

Every step must contain the actual content an engineer needs. These are **plan failures** — never write them:
- "TBD", "TODO", "implement later", "fill in details"
- "Add appropriate error handling" / "add validation" / "handle edge cases"
- "Write tests for the above" (without actual test code)
- "Similar to Task N" (repeat the code — the engineer may be reading tasks out of order)
- Steps that describe what to do without showing how (code blocks required for code steps)
- References to types, functions, or methods not defined in any task

## Remember
- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in every step — if a step changes code, show the code
- Exact commands with expected output
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Self-Review

After writing the complete plan, look at the spec with fresh eyes and check the plan against it. This is a checklist you run yourself — not a subagent dispatch.

**1. Spec coverage:** Skim each section/requirement in the spec. Can you point to a task that implements it? List any gaps.

**2. Placeholder scan:** Search your plan for red flags — any of the patterns from the "No Placeholders" section above. Fix them.

**3. Type consistency:** Do the types, method signatures, and property names you used in later tasks match what you defined in earlier tasks? A function called `clearLayers()` in Task 3 but `clearFullLayers()` in Task 7 is a bug.

If you find issues, fix them inline. No need to re-review — just fix and move on. If you find a spec requirement with no task, add the task.

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan, offer execution choice:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Two execution options:**

**1. Subagent-Driven (recommended)** - I dispatch a fresh subagent per task, review between tasks, fast iteration

**2. Inline Execution** - Execute tasks in this session using executing-plans, batch execution with checkpoints

**Which approach?"**

**If Subagent-Driven chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If Inline Execution chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review
```

```text
[tool_result: toolu_01CeLqdifaAj2hPAwNmv1b3Z]
1	import struct
2	import can
3	
4	from motor_gui.backend.transport.ak_device import AkDevice, PKT_STATUS_1, AK_ID
5	
6	
7	class StubBus:
8	    def __init__(self):
9	        self.sent = []
10	    def send(self, msg, timeout=None):
11	        self.sent.append(msg)
12	
13	
14	def _status_msg(pos_deg=12.0, spd_erpm=0, cur_a=0.0, temp=40, fault=0):
15	    # AK40._parse_status: ">hhhbb" = pos*10, spd/10, cur*100, temp, fault
16	    data = struct.pack(">hhhbb", int(pos_deg * 10), int(spd_erpm / 10),
17	                       int(cur_a * 100), temp, fault)
18	    return can.Message(arbitration_id=(PKT_STATUS_1 << 8) | AK_ID,
19	                       data=data, is_extended_id=True)
20	
21	
22	def _mk():
23	    d = AkDevice()
24	    bus = StubBus()
25	    d.attach(bus)
26	    return d, bus
27	
28	
29	def test_capabilities_fragment_modes_and_commands():
30	    f = AkDevice().capabilities_fragment()
31	    assert f["devices"] == ["ak"]
32	    assert f["control_modes"]["ak"] == ["position", "velocity", "duty"]
33	    assert "set_param" in f["commands"]["ak"]
34	    assert f["inputs"]["ak"]["velocity"]["key"] == "rpm"
35	    assert "ak.fault" in f["signals"]
36	
37	
38	def test_set_input_velocity_sends_rpm_frame():
39	    d, bus = _mk()
40	    d.apply(bus, "set_mode", {"control_mode": "velocity"})
41	    d.apply(bus, "set_input", {"rpm": 30.0})
42	    # PKT_SET_RPM=3
43	    assert bus.sent[-1].arbitration_id == (3 << 8) | AK_ID
44	
45	
46	def test_on_rx_parses_status_and_sample_converts_speed():
47	    d, bus = _mk()
48	    # -1400 erpm → +10 출력RPM (명령 부호 일치)
49	    d.on_rx(_status_msg(pos_deg=12.0, spd_erpm=-1400, cur_a=1.5, temp=42, fault=0))
50	    s = d.sample()
51	    assert abs(s["ak.pos_deg"] - 12.0) < 0.1
52	    assert abs(s["ak.speed"] - 10.0) < 0.2          # -1400 erpm → +10 출력RPM (명령 부호 일치)
53	    assert abs(s["ak.current"] - 1.5) < 0.05
54	    assert s["ak.temp"] == 42
55	
56	
57	def test_set_param_then_position_uses_spd():
58	    d, bus = _mk()
59	    d.apply(bus, "set_param", {"spd_erpm": 2222, "acc_erpm_s2": 3333, "max_cur_a": 7.0})
60	    d.apply(bus, "set_input", {"pos_deg": 90.0})
61	    # PKT_SET_POS_SPD=6, data=">ihh" (deg*1e4, spd, acc)
62	    msg = bus.sent[-1]
63	    assert msg.arbitration_id == (6 << 8) | AK_ID
64	    pos, spd, acc = struct.unpack(">ihh", msg.data)
65	    assert pos == 900000 and spd == 222 and acc == 333   # spd/acc 필드는 erpm÷10 (AK ×10 해석)
66	
67	
68	def test_overcurrent_trips_in_tick():
69	    d, bus = _mk()
70	    d.apply(bus, "set_param", {"max_cur_a": 3.0})
71	    d.apply(bus, "set_input", {"rpm": 50.0})
72	    d.on_rx(_status_msg(cur_a=5.0))     # 한계 초과
73	    n_before = len(bus.sent)
74	    d.tick(bus)
75	    # rpm0 정지 프레임 송신 + active 해제
76	    assert len(bus.sent) > n_before
77	    assert d._active is None
78	
79	
80	def test_tick_resends_active_when_not_tripped():
81	    d, bus = _mk()
82	    d.apply(bus, "set_mode", {"control_mode": "velocity"})
83	    d.apply(bus, "set_input", {"rpm": 30.0})
84	    n_before = len(bus.sent)
85	    d._last_send = 0.0                  # 워치독 간격 강제 경과
86	    d.tick(bus)

88	    assert d._tripped is False

90

93	    d.apply(bus, "set_mode", {"control_mode": "velocity"})
94	    d.apply(bus, "set_input", {"rpm": 30.0})
95	    n_before = len(bus.sent)
96	    ack = d.apply(bus, "estop", {})
97	    assert ack["ok"] is True
98	    assert d._active is None

106	    assert ack["ok"] is False

118	    f = AkDevice().capabilities_fragment()

121	    assert abs(tk["spd_rpm"]["value"] - 1500.0 / 140) < 1e-6
122	    assert tk["max_cur_a"]["value"] == 5.0
123	
124

141	    d.apply(bus, "set_origin", {})
142	    assert d._pos_cmd == 0.0
143	
144

146	    d, bus = _mk()
```

```text
1	from motor_gui.backend.transport.can_device import CanDevice, CanTransport
2	
3	
4	class StubBus:
5	    def __init__(self, rx=None):
6	        self.sent = []
7	        self._rx = list(rx or [])
8	    def send(self, msg, timeout=None):
9	        self.sent.append(msg)
10	    def recv(self, timeout=None):
11	        return self._rx.pop(0) if self._rx else None
12	    def shutdown(self):
13	        pass
14	
15	
16	class StubDevice(CanDevice):
17	    name = "stub"
18	    def __init__(self):
19	        self.attached = None
20	        self.rx_count = 0
21	    def attach(self, bus):
22	        self.attached = bus
23	    def capabilities_fragment(self):
24	        return {"devices": ["stub"], "signals": ["stub.x"],
25	                "commands": {"stub": ["ping"]}, "control_modes": {},
26	                "inputs": {}, "tunables": {}, "limits": {"stub": {}},
27	                "signal_meta": {"stub.x": {"label": "X", "unit": ""}}}
28	    def on_rx(self, msg):
29	        self.rx_count += 1
30	    def sample(self):
31	        return {"stub.x": 1.0}
32	    def apply(self, bus, op, args):
33	        return {"ok": True, "target": "stub", "op": op, "detail": "ok"}
34	
35	
36	def test_capabilities_merges_device_fragments():
37	    t = CanTransport([StubDevice()], track="ak", bus=StubBus())
38	    caps = t.capabilities()
39	    assert caps["track"] == "ak"
40	    assert caps["devices"] == ["stub"]
41	    assert "stub.x" in caps["signals"]
42	    assert caps["commands"]["stub"] == ["ping"]
43	    assert caps["signal_meta"]["stub.x"]["label"] == "X"
44	
45	
46	def test_sample_merges_and_has_t_mono():
47	    t = CanTransport([StubDevice()], bus=StubBus())
48	    t.connect()
49	    s = t.sample()
50	    assert "t_mono" in s and s["stub.x"] == 1.0
51	
52	
53	def test_apply_routes_by_target():
54	    dev = StubDevice()
55	    t = CanTransport([dev], bus=StubBus())
56	    t.connect()
57	    ack = t.apply({"target": "stub", "op": "ping", "args": {}})
58	    assert ack["ok"] is True
59	    bad = t.apply({"target": "nope", "op": "ping", "args": {}})
60	    assert bad["ok"] is False and bad["detail"] == "unknown target"
61	
62	
63	def test_attach_called_on_connect():

65	    bus = StubBus()

67	    t.connect()
68	    assert dev.attached is bus

70	
71	def test_recv_frame_fans_out_to_all_devices():
72	    import can
73	    rx = [can.Message(arbitration_id=0x123, data=b"\x00", is_extended_id=False)]
74	    dev_a, dev_b = StubDevice(), StubDevice()
75	    t = CanTransport([dev_a, dev_b], bus=StubBus(rx=rx))
76	    t.connect()

79	    assert dev_b.rx_count == 1
80	
81	
82	def test_close_nulls_owned_bus_so_reconnect_reopens():
83	    # owns_bus=True (bus 주입 안 함). 연결된 척 _bus 를 채워두고 close → None 이어야
84	    # 다음 connect() 가 socketcan 을 재오픈한다.
85	    t = CanTransport([StubDevice()], bus=None)
86	    assert t._owns_bus is True
87	    t._bus = StubBus()
88	    t.close()
89	    assert t._bus is None
90	
91	
92	def test_close_keeps_injected_bus():
93	    # 주입 버스(owns_bus=False)는 close 후에도 유지(테스트/외부 소유).
94	    bus = StubBus()
95	    t = CanTransport([StubDevice()], bus=bus)
96	    assert t._owns_bus is False
97	    t.close()
98	    assert t._bus is bus
```

```text
[tool_result: toolu_019jC63QtsJoraeHGp94aJzp]
1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	
4	class CommandError(Exception):
5	    """잘못된/미지원 command envelope."""
6	
7	
8	def normalize(cmd: dict, caps: dict) -> dict:
9	    """envelope 검증 + 인자 클램프. 실패 시 CommandError. 정규화된 dict 반환."""
10	    if not isinstance(cmd, dict):
11	        raise CommandError("command must be an object")
12	    target = cmd.get("target")
13	    op = cmd.get("op")
14	    args = dict(cmd.get("args") or {})
15	
16	    allowed = caps.get("commands", {})
17	    if target not in allowed:
18	        raise CommandError(f"unknown target: {target!r}")
19	    if op not in allowed[target]:
20	        raise CommandError(f"op {op!r} not supported for target {target!r}")
21	
22	    args = _clamp(target, op, args, caps)
23	    return {"target": target, "op": op, "args": args}
24	
25	
26	def _clamp(target: str, op: str, args: dict, caps: dict) -> dict:
27	    limits = caps.get("limits", {}).get(target, {})
28	    if op == "set_input":
29	        for key in ("pos", "vel", "torque", "pos_deg", "rpm", "duty"):
30	            if key in args and key in limits:
31	                hi = abs(float(limits[key]))
32	                args[key] = max(-hi, min(hi, float(args[key])))
33	    elif op == "set_limit":
34	        for key in ("vel_limit", "current_lim"):
35	            if key in args:
36	                args[key] = max(0.0, float(args[key]))
37	    return args
38
```

### user `2026-05-22T16:20:02.965Z` line 3615

```text
Base directory for this skill: /home/light/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.1.0/skills/subagent-driven-development

# Subagent-Driven Development

Execute plan by dispatching fresh subagent per task, with two-stage review after each: spec compliance review first, then code quality review.

**Why subagents:** You delegate tasks to specialized agents with isolated context. By precisely crafting their instructions and context, you ensure they stay focused and succeed at their task. They should never inherit your session's context or history — you construct exactly what they need. This also preserves your own context for coordination work.

**Core principle:** Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review (spec then quality) = high quality, fast iteration

**Continuous execution:** Do not pause to check in with your human partner between tasks. Execute all tasks from the plan without stopping. The only reasons to stop are: BLOCKED status you cannot resolve, ambiguity that genuinely prevents progress, or all tasks complete. "Should I continue?" prompts and progress summaries waste their time — they asked you to execute the plan, so execute it.

## When to Use

` ` `dot
digraph when_to_use {
    "Have implementation plan?" [shape=diamond];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" [shape=diamond];
    "Stay in this session?" [shape=diamond];
    "subagent-driven-development" [shape=box];
    "executing-plans" [shape=box];
    "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [shape=box];

    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Tasks mostly independent?" [label="yes"];
    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Stay in this session?" [label="yes"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no - tightly coupled"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "subagent-driven-development" [label="yes"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "executing-plans" [label="no - parallel session"];
}
` ` `

**vs. Executing Plans (parallel session):**
- Same session (no context switch)
- Fresh subagent per task (no context pollution)
- Two-stage review after each task: spec compliance first, then code quality
- Faster iteration (no human-in-loop between tasks)

## The Process

` ` `dot
digraph process {
    rankdir=TB;

    subgraph cluster_per_task {
        label="Per Task";
        "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent asks questions?" [shape=diamond];
        "Answer questions, provide context" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [shape=box];
        "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    }

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    "More tasks remain?" [shape=diamond];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [shape=box];
    "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch" [shape=box style=filled fillcolor=lightgreen];

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" -> "Implementer subagent asks questions?";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Answer questions, provide context" [label="yes"];
    "Answer questions, provide context" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?";
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?";
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [label="yes"];
    "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" -> "More tasks remain?";
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [label="no"];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" -> "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch";
}
` ` `

## Model Selection

Use the least powerful model that can handle each role to conserve cost and increase speed.

**Mechanical implementation tasks** (isolated functions, clear specs, 1-2 files): use a fast, cheap model. Most implementation tasks are mechanical when the plan is well-specified.

**Integration and judgment tasks** (multi-file coordination, pattern matching, debugging): use a standard model.

**Architecture, design, and review tasks**: use the most capable available model.

**Task complexity signals:**
- Touches 1-2 files with a complete spec → cheap model
- Touches multiple files with integration concerns → standard model
- Requires design judgment or broad codebase understanding → most capable model

## Handling Implementer Status

Implementer subagents report one of four statuses. Handle each appropriately:

**DONE:** Proceed to spec compliance review.

**DONE_WITH_CONCERNS:** The implementer completed the work but flagged doubts. Read the concerns before proceeding. If the concerns are about correctness or scope, address them before review. If they're observations (e.g., "this file is getting large"), note them and proceed to review.

**NEEDS_CONTEXT:** The implementer needs information that wasn't provided. Provide the missing context and re-dispatch.

**BLOCKED:** The implementer cannot complete the task. Assess the blocker:
1. If it's a context problem, provide more context and re-dispatch with the same model
2. If the task requires more reasoning, re-dispatch with a more capable model
3. If the task is too large, break it into smaller pieces
4. If the plan itself is wrong, escalate to the human

**Never** ignore an escalation or force the same model to retry without changes. If the implementer said it's stuck, something needs to change.

## Prompt Templates

- `./implementer-prompt.md` - Dispatch implementer subagent
- `./spec-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch spec compliance reviewer subagent
- `./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent

## Example Workflow

` ` `
You: I'm using Subagent-Driven Development to execute this plan.

[Read plan file once: docs/superpowers/plans/feature-plan.md]
[Extract all 5 tasks with full text and context]
[Create TodoWrite with all tasks]

Task 1: Hook installation script

[Get Task 1 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: "Before I begin - should the hook be installed at user or system level?"

You: "User level (~/.config/superpowers/hooks/)"

Implementer: "Got it. Implementing now..."
[Later] Implementer:
  - Implemented install-hook command
  - Added tests, 5/5 passing
  - Self-review: Found I missed --force flag, added it
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant - all requirements met, nothing extra

[Get git SHAs, dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Good test coverage, clean. Issues: None. Approved.

[Mark Task 1 complete]

Task 2: Recovery modes

[Get Task 2 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: [No questions, proceeds]
Implementer:
  - Added verify/repair modes
  - 8/8 tests passing
  - Self-review: All good
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ❌ Issues:
  - Missing: Progress reporting (spec says "report every 100 items")
  - Extra: Added --json flag (not requested)

[Implementer fixes issues]
Implementer: Removed --json flag, added progress reporting

[Spec reviewer reviews again]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant now

[Dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Solid. Issues (Important): Magic number (100)

[Implementer fixes]
Implementer: Extracted PROGRESS_INTERVAL constant

[Code reviewer reviews again]
Code reviewer: ✅ Approved

[Mark Task 2 complete]

...

[After all tasks]
[Dispatch final code-reviewer]
Final reviewer: All requirements met, ready to merge

Done!
` ` `

## Advantages

**vs. Manual execution:**
- Subagents follow TDD naturally
- Fresh context per task (no confusion)
- Parallel-safe (subagents don't interfere)
- Subagent can ask questions (before AND during work)

**vs. Executing Plans:**
- Same session (no handoff)
- Continuous progress (no waiting)
- Review checkpoints automatic

**Efficiency gains:**
- No file reading overhead (controller provides full text)
- Controller curates exactly what context is needed
- Subagent gets complete information upfront
- Questions surfaced before work begins (not after)

**Quality gates:**
- Self-review catches issues before handoff
- Two-stage review: spec compliance, then code quality
- Review loops ensure fixes actually work
- Spec compliance prevents over/under-building
- Code quality ensures implementation is well-built

**Cost:**
- More subagent invocations (implementer + 2 reviewers per task)
- Controller does more prep work (extracting all tasks upfront)
- Review loops add iterations
- But catches issues early (cheaper than debugging later)

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Start implementation on main/master branch without explicit user consent
- Skip reviews (spec compliance OR code quality)
- Proceed with unfixed issues
- Dispatch multiple implementation subagents in parallel (conflicts)
- Make subagent read plan file (provide full text instead)
- Skip scene-setting context (subagent needs to understand where task fits)
- Ignore subagent questions (answer before letting them proceed)
- Accept "close enough" on spec compliance (spec reviewer found issues = not done)
- Skip review loops (reviewer found issues = implementer fixes = review again)
- Let implementer self-review replace actual review (both are needed)
- **Start code quality review before spec compliance is ✅** (wrong order)
- Move to next task while either review has open issues

**If subagent asks questions:**
- Answer clearly and completely
- Provide additional context if needed
- Don't rush them into implementation

**If reviewer finds issues:**
- Implementer (same subagent) fixes them
- Reviewer reviews again
- Repeat until approved
- Don't skip the re-review

**If subagent fails task:**
- Dispatch fix subagent with specific instructions
- Don't try to fix manually (context pollution)

## Integration

**Required workflow skills:**
- **superpowers:using-git-worktrees** - Ensures i
...[truncated]
```

```text
1	# Implementer Subagent Prompt Template
2	
3	Use this template when dispatching an implementer subagent.
4	
5	` ` `
6	Task tool (general-purpose):
7	  description: "Implement Task N: [task name]"
8	  prompt: |
9	    You are implementing Task N: [task name]
10	
11	    ## Task Description
12	
13	    [FULL TEXT of task from plan - paste it here, don't make subagent read file]
14	
15	    ## Context
16	
17	    [Scene-setting: where this fits, dependencies, architectural context]
18	
19	    ## Before You Begin
20	
21	    If you have questions about:
22	    - The requirements or acceptance criteria
23	    - The approach or implementation strategy
24	    - Dependencies or assumptions
25	    - Anything unclear in the task description
26	
27	    **Ask them now.** Raise any concerns before starting work.
28	
29	    ## Your Job
30	
31	    Once you're clear on requirements:
32	    1. Implement exactly what the task specifies
33	    2. Write tests (following TDD if task says to)
34	    3. Verify implementation works
35	    4. Commit your work
36	    5. Self-review (see below)
37	    6. Report back
38	
39	    Work from: [directory]
40	
41	    **While you work:** If you encounter something unexpected or unclear, **ask questions**.
42	    It's always OK to pause and clarify. Don't guess or make assumptions.
43	
44	    ## Code Organization
45	
46	    You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more
47	    reliable when files are focused. Keep this in mind:
48	    - Follow the file structure defined in the plan
49	    - Each file should have one clear responsibility with a well-defined interface
50	    - If a file you're creating is growing beyond the plan's intent, stop and report
51	      it as DONE_WITH_CONCERNS — don't split files on your own without plan guidance
52	    - If an existing file you're modifying is already large or tangled, work carefully
53	      and note it as a concern in your report
54	    - In existing codebases, follow established patterns. Improve code you're touching
55	      the way a good developer would, but don't restructure things outside your task.
56	
57	    ## When You're in Over Your Head
58	
59	    It is always OK to stop and say "this is too hard for me." Bad work is worse than
60	    no work. You will not be penalized for escalating.
61	
62	    **STOP and escalate when:**
63	    - The task requires architectural decisions with multiple valid approaches
64	    - You need to understand code beyond what was provided and can't find clarity
65	    - You feel uncertain about whether your approach is correct
66	    - The task involves restructuring existing code in ways the plan didn't anticipate
67	    - You've been reading file after file trying to understand the system without progress
68	
69	    **How to escalate:** Report back with status BLOCKED or NEEDS_CONTEXT. Describe
70	    specifically what you're stuck on, what you've tried, and what kind of help you need.
71	    The controller can provide more context, re-dispatch with a more capable model,
72	    or break the task into smaller pieces.
73	
74	    ## Before Reporting Back: Self-Review
75	
76	    Review your work with fresh eyes. Ask yourself:
77	
78	    **Completeness:**
79	    - Did I fully implement everything in the spec?
80	    - Did I miss any requirements?
81	    - Are there edge cases I didn't handle?
82	
83	    **Quality:**
84	    - Is this my best work?
85	    - Are names clear and accurate (match what things do, not how they work)?
86	    - Is the code clean and maintainable?
87	
88	    **Discipline:**
89	    - Did I avoid overbuilding (YAGNI)?
90	    - Did I only build what was requested?
91	    - Did I follow existing patterns in the codebase?
92	
93	    **Testing:**
94	    - Do tests actually verify behavior (not just mock behavior)?
95	    - Did I follow TDD if required?
96	    - Are tests comprehensive?
97	
98	    If you find issues during self-review, fix them now before reporting.
99	
100	    ## Report Format
101	
102	    When done, report:
103	    - **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
104	    - What you implemented (or what you attempted, if blocked)
105	    - What you tested and test results
106	    - Files changed
107	    - Self-review findings (if any)
108	    - Any issues or concerns
109	
110	    Use DONE_WITH_CONCERNS if you completed the work but have doubts about correctness.
111	    Use BLOCKED if you cannot complete the task. Use NEEDS_CONTEXT if you need
112	    information that wasn't provided. Never silently produce work you're unsure about.
113	` ` `
114
```

```text
1	# Spec Compliance Reviewer Prompt Template

3	Use this template when dispatching a spec compliance reviewer subagent.

8	Task tool (general-purpose):
9	  description: "Review spec compliance for Task N"
10	  prompt: |
11	    You are reviewing whether an implementation matches its specification.
12	
13	    ## What Was Requested
14	
15	    [FULL TEXT of task requirements]
16	
17	    ## What Implementer Claims They Built
18	
19	    [From implementer's report]
20	
21	    ## CRITICAL: Do Not Trust the Report
22	
23	    The implementer finished suspiciously quickly. Their report may be incomplete,
24	    inaccurate, or optimistic. You MUST verify everything independently.
25	
26	    **DO NOT:**
27	    - Take their word for what they implemented
28	    - Trust their claims about completeness
29	    - Accept their interpretation of requirements
30	
31	    **DO:**
32	    - Read the actual code they wrote
33	    - Compare actual implementation to requirements line by line
34	    - Check for missing pieces they claimed to implement
35	    - Look for extra features they didn't mention
36	
37	    ## Your Job
38	
39	    Read the implementation code and verify:
40	
41	    **Missing requirements:**
42	    - Did they implement everything that was requested?
43	    - Are there requirements they skipped or missed?
44	    - Did they claim something works but didn't actually implement it?
45	
46	    **Extra/unneeded work:**
47	    - Did they build things that weren't requested?
48	    - Did they over-engineer or add unnecessary features?
49	    - Did they add "nice to haves" that weren't in spec?
50	
51	    **Misunderstandings:**
52	    - Did they interpret requirements differently than intended?
53	    - Did they solve the wrong problem?
54	    - Did they implement the right feature but wrong way?
55	
56	    **Verify by reading code, not by trusting report.**
57	
58	    Report:
59	    - ✅ Spec compliant (if everything matches after code inspection)
60	    - ❌ Issues found: [list specifically what's missing or extra, with file:line references]
61	` ` `
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:52:02.451Z` line 3799

```text
텔레메트리 검증 **성공** — RTR 폴링이 실제 값을 읽고 있습니다:
- `pos = 0.236` turn (실 엔코더), `vbus = 12.0V` (실 버스전압), `state = 1`(IDLE), `axis_err = 0`
- 4개 RTR 폴(enc/iq/temp/bus)이 8ms 윈도 안에 모두 응답 → watch-list #1 해소
- `iq=0`, `torque_est=0` (정지 상태라 정상)
- ⚠️ `temp_fet = 3.1℃`는 비현실적으로 낮음 — 디코드는 vbus와 동일 `<ff` 첫 float이고 vbus가 정확하므로 **디코드 버그 아님**, ODrive FET 서미스터 미연결/보정 문제(USB에서도 동일하게 나올 값). 비차단.

여기까지 **읽기/연결은 완전 정상**입니다. 다음은 모터가 **물리적으로 움직이는** 테스트(폐루프 진입·각 모드·영점·TRAP 변속)인데, 하드웨어를 보고 계신 분의 확인이 필요합니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:55:20.230Z` line 3816

```text
`set_state`는 ok로 전송됐지만 **state가 8(CLOSED_LOOP)이 아니라 1(IDLE) 그대로**입니다. axis_err=0 (에러 없음). pos_setpoint은 현재 위치(0.236)로 잘 잡혔습니다(점프 방지 동작 OK).

폐루프 진입이 조용히 거부됐습니다 — 보통 **캘리브레이션/엔코더 ready 미충족** 시 ODrive가 CLOSED_LOOP을 거부하고 IDLE로 되돌립니다. systematic-debugging으로 정확히 진단하겠습니다. 먼저 서버를 잠시 멈추고 raw CAN으로 motor/encoder 서브에러를 직접 조회합니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:56:05.159Z` line 3828

```text
**can0가 BUS-OFF 상태입니다** (berr tx 252, rx 0, NO-CARRIER, state DOWN). 이건 AK 때 겪은 것과 동일한 패턴 — **tx만 오르고 rx=0 = ODrive가 ACK를 안 함**. ODrive가 버스에서 떨어졌습니다 (전원 sag/리셋 또는 케이블). 소프트웨어 버그가 아니라 버스 물리 상태입니다.

can0를 리셋하고 ODrive가 돌아오는지 확인합니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:57:26.485Z` line 3837

```text
**핵심 진단 결과:**
- motor_error = 0, encoder_error = 0 (서브에러 없음)
- **raw CAN으로 `Set_Axis_State(8)` 직접 전송 → state=8 (CLOSED_LOOP) 정상 진입!** 즉 ODrive CAN 폐루프는 잘 되고, **OdriveCanDevice의 명령 인코딩도 정확**합니다.

문제는 BUS-OFF였습니다. 앱 운영 중 폐루프 진입 시점에 ODrive가 순간적으로 ACK를 못 하면 100Hz RTR 폴링(400프레임/s)이 tx 에러를 빠르게 쌓아 **bus-off → 통신 정지 → state가 1로 고착**된 것으로 보입니다. can0에 **자동 bus-off 복구(`restart-ms`)가 꺼져 있는 것**(restart-ms 0)이 핵심입니다.

먼저 모터를 IDLE로 되돌리고, 자동복구를 켠 뒤 앱 경로로 재검증합니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T16:58:05.537Z` line 3845

```text
두 가지 발견:
1. `restart-ms`는 can0가 UP인 상태에선 못 바꿈("busy") → down 후 설정 필요
2. axis_err가 **0x200 (CONTROLLER_FAILED)** 으로 떴습니다 — raw로 mode/setpoint 없이 폐루프 넣었다 IDLE로 뺀 탓(overspeed류, USB에서 본 그 0x200). clear_errors 필요.

can0를 자동복구 포함해 재설정하고 ODrive 에러를 정리합니다.
```

### assistant `2026-05-22T17:03:06.053Z` line 3873

```text
중요한 통찰 감사합니다 — **1Mbps는 마진 불량 배선에 매우 민감**합니다. 지금 본 bus-off/ENOBUFS/간헐 ACK 실패는 고속 baud + 마진 버스의 전형적 증상입니다. ODrive 기본값 **250000으로 내리면 훨씬 안정적**일 것입니다.

지시대로 진행하겠습니다: ① ODrive 공장초기화 → ② 증명된 캘리/테스트 코드로 재설정·검증 → ③ Jetson CAN도 250000으로. 먼저 **증명된 스크립트들을 읽어** 정확한 설정(baud/node_id/캘리 순서)을 파악하겠습니다.
```

```text
이게 결정적입니다. 증명된 셋업 스크립트가 알려주는 사실:
- **BAUDRATE = 250000** (검증된 작동 baud — 제 HIL은 1Mbps라 불안정했던 게 맞습니다)
- `encoder_rate_ms = 10` → **RTR 폴링이 아니라 cyclic 엔코더 브로드캐스트(10ms)** 사용 (제 디바이스의 RTR 폴링과 다름!)
- NODE_ID=1, pp=7, cpr=16384, FULL_CALIB → pre_calibrated, startup_closed_loop=False, USB로 실행

증명된 테스트런 코드(`odrive_can_drive.py`)도 읽어 구동 방식을 봅니다.
```

```text
[tool_result: toolu_01ErxU2fUknAbSXcAyrbo2Su]
1	import can
2	import struct
3	import time
4	import logging
5	
6	logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s')
7	
8	BUS_CHANNEL = 'can0'
9	NODE_ID = 1  
10	MAX_POS = 10.0
11	MIN_POS = -10.0
12	
13	CMD_HEARTBEAT = 0x001
14	CMD_SET_STATE = 0x007
15	CMD_SET_INPUT_POS = 0x00C
16	CMD_CLEAR_ERRORS = 0x018
17	CMD_GET_ENCODER_ESTIMATES = 0x009
18	
19	AXIS_STATE_IDLE = 1
20	AXIS_STATE_CLOSED_LOOP_CONTROL = 8
21	
22	def send_can(bus, cmd_id, data=b''):
23	    arb_id = (NODE_ID << 5) | cmd_id
24	    msg = can.Message(arbitration_id=arb_id, data=data, is_extended_id=False)
25	    try: bus.send(msg)
26	    except can.CanError as e: logging.error(f"CAN 전송 실패: {e}")
27	
28	def request_data(bus, cmd_id):
29	    arb_id = (NODE_ID << 5) | cmd_id
30	    msg = can.Message(arbitration_id=arb_id, is_remote_frame=True, is_extended_id=False)
31	    try: bus.send(msg)
32	    except can.CanError: pass
33	
34	def wait_for_boot(bus):
35	    """💡 ODrive가 부팅 및 영점 캘리브레이션을 마칠 때까지 기다립니다."""
36	    logging.info("⏳ ODrive 캘리브레이션 완료를 기다리는 중... (최대 10초)")
37	    start_wait = time.time()
38	    
39	    while time.time() - start_wait < 10.0:
40	        request_data(bus, CMD_HEARTBEAT)
41	        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.1)
42	        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == ((NODE_ID << 5) | CMD_HEARTBEAT):
43	            state = msg.data[4]
44	            if state == AXIS_STATE_IDLE:
45	                logging.info("✅ ODrive 준비 완료! (IDLE 상태 확인)")
46	                return True
47	            elif state == AXIS_STATE_CLOSED_LOOP_CONTROL:
48	                return True
49	            else:
50	                print(f"   -> ODrive 캘리브레이션 진행 중... (상태 코드: {state})", end='\r')
51	                
52	    logging.error("\n❌ 대기 시간 초과! ODrive 상태를 확인하세요.")
53	    return False
54	
55	def get_current_position(bus):
56	    """💡 제어 켤 때 튀는 걸 막기 위해 현재 위치를 읽어옵니다."""
57	    request_data(bus, CMD_GET_ENCODER_ESTIMATES)
58	    start = time.time()
59	    while time.time() - start < 1.0:
60	        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.1)
61	        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == ((NODE_ID << 5) | CMD_GET_ENCODER_ESTIMATES):
62	            pos, _ = struct.unpack('<ff', msg.data)
63	            return pos
64	    return 0.0
65	
66	def wait_for_position(bus, target_pos, tolerance=0.05, timeout=5.0):
67	    start_time = time.time()
68	    last_req = 0
69	    
70	    while time.time() - start_time < timeout:
71	        if time.time() - last_req > 0.05:
72	            request_data(bus, CMD_GET_ENCODER_ESTIMATES)
73	            request_data(bus, CMD_HEARTBEAT)
74	            last_req = time.time()
75	            
76	        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.05)
77	        if msg is None: continue
78	            
79	        if msg.arbitration_id == ((NODE_ID << 5) | CMD_HEARTBEAT):
80	            err = struct.unpack('<I', msg.data[:4])[0] 
81	            if err != 0:
82	                logging.error(f"🚨 하트비트 에러 감지! Error: {hex(err)}")
83	                return False
84	                
85	        elif msg.arbitration_id == ((NODE_ID << 5) | CMD_GET_ENCODER_ESTIMATES):
86	            pos, _ = struct.unpack('<ff', msg.data)
87	            print(f"   -> 실시간 위치: {pos:.3f} / 목표: {target_pos:.3f}   ", end='\r')
88	            if abs(pos - target_pos) <= tolerance:
89	                print()
90	                logging.info(f"✅ 목표 도달 완료! (최종 오차: {abs(pos - target_pos):.4f} turns)")
91	                return True
92	
93	    print()
94	    logging.warning("⚠️ 타임아웃: 모터가 목표에 도달하지 못했습니다.")
95	    return False
96	
97	def main():
98	    bus = None
99	    try:
100	        filters = [{"can_id": NODE_ID << 5, "can_mask": 0x7E0, "extended": False}]
101	        bus = can.interface.Bus(channel=BUS_CHANNEL, interface='socketcan', can_filters=filters)
102	        while bus.recv(timeout=0.01) is not None: pass
103	
104	        logging.info(f"🔌 CAN 버스({BUS_CHANNEL}) 주행 시작...")
105	
106	        # 💡 [핵심] ODrive가 완전히 준비될 때까지 알아서 대기!
107	        if not wait_for_boot(bus):
108	            return
109	
110	        logging.info("🧹 에러 클리어")
111	        send_can(bus, CMD_CLEAR_ERRORS)
112	        time.sleep(0.1)
113	
114	        # 💡 [핵심] 튀는 현상을 막기 위해 현재 위치를 목표 위치로 미리 동기화
115	        curr_pos = get_current_position(bus)
116	        logging.info(f"🔄 동기화: 내부 목표값을 현재 위치({curr_pos:.3f})로 락킹")
117	        send_can(bus, CMD_SET_INPUT_POS, struct.pack('<fhh', curr_pos, 0, 0))
118	        time.sleep(0.1)
119	
120	        logging.info("🚀 제어 모드(CLOSED_LOOP) 진입")
121	        send_can(bus, CMD_SET_STATE, struct.pack('<i', AXIS_STATE_CLOSED_LOOP_CONTROL)) 
122	        time.sleep(0.5)
123	
124	        target_positions = [5.0, 0.0]
125	        for pos in target_positions:
126	            clamped_pos = max(MIN_POS, min(MAX_POS, pos))
127	            logging.info(f"🎯 [명령 발송] 목표 위치: {clamped_pos} turns")
128	            send_can(bus, CMD_SET_INPUT_POS, struct.pack('<fhh', clamped_pos, 0, 0))
129	            
130	            success = wait_for_position(bus, target_pos=clamped_pos, tolerance=0.01, timeout=8.0)
131	            if not success:
132	                logging.error("❌ 주행 실패로 인해 후속 명령을 취소합니다.")
133	                break
134	            time.sleep(1.0)
135	
136	    except KeyboardInterrupt:
137	        logging.warning("사용자 인터럽트(Ctrl+C) 수신!")
138	    except Exception as e:
139	        logging.critical(f"시스템 에러: {e}")
140	    finally:
141	        if bus is not None:
142	            logging.info("🛑 안전 모드(IDLE) 전환 및 버스 종료")
143	            try:
144	                send_can(bus, CMD_SET_STATE, struct.pack('<i', AXIS_STATE_IDLE))
145	                bus.shutdown()
146	            except: pass
147	
148	if __name__ == "__main__":
149	    main()
150
```

```text
셋업 결과:

- node_id=1 설정·저장됨. encoder_rate_ms(cyclic)는 미지원 → RTR 폴링 유지(제 디바이스 방식과 일치).

이제 **Jetson can0를 250000으로** 맞춥니다(현재 1M). 그 후 하트비트 확인.
```
